description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named macOS System CI that runs daily at 3 am and on pull requests to the master branch. Use a macos-latest job that sets up the GHA_BRANCH_NAME environment variable, installs BioDynaMo, checks out the repository, sets the INSTALL_DIR environment variable, caches pyenv and third-party packages, installs prerequisites, builds BioDynaMo, runs notebooks, performs system tests, and notifies Slack on success, failure, or cancellation.
